title: SubscriptionManagementSettings - Metadata API
description: Represents the settings used to manage recurring subscriptions.

enableBillingDocGen.description: Indicates whether document generation is enabled in the org (true) or not (false). The default value is false.

enableConvertNegativeInvoiceLinesToCredi.description: Indicates whether to convert negative invoice lines into a credit note (true) or not (false). This credit note holds a positive balance that you can later use to apply against future invoices. The default value is false.

enableInvHeaderLvlSettlement.description: Indicates whether payments can be applied on the whole invoice (true) or only on invoice lines (false). The default value is false.

enablePaymentScheduleAutomation.description: Indicates whether the payment schedule and payment schedule item are created automatically (true) or not (false). The default value is false.

enableRefundAutomation.description: Indicates whether refunds are processed automatically (true) or not (false). The default value is false.

enableRevSubMgmtBlngOptOut.description: Indicates whether the billing schedules in Subscription Management are disabled (true) or not (false). The default value is false.

enableSubscriptionManagement.description: Indicates whether Subscription Management is enabled (true) or not (false). The default value is false.

wsdl_segment:
```xml
<xsd:complexType name="SubscriptionManagementSettings">
  <xsd:complexContent>
    <xsd:extension base="tns:Metadata">
      <xsd:sequence>
        <xsd:element name="enableConvertNegativeInvoiceLinesToCreditMemoAndApply" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="enablePaymentScheduleAutomation" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="enableRefundAutomation" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="enableRevSubMgmtBlngOptOut" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="enableSubscriptionManagement" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
      </xsd:sequence>
    </xsd:extension>
  </xsd:complexContent>
</xsd:complexType>
```
